root.rep_text: รายงานรายการวัสดุของสหกรณ์ที่ตัดจ่าย NEW
root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire.entry_id, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.accu_expire_amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.bf_value as balance, sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date, sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status, ( select description from sc_acc_m_ucf_expire_cut where cut_paid_status = sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status ) as cut_paid_status1 FROM sc_acc_m_expire ,sc_acc_m_expire_detail WHERE sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status != 0 and sc_acc_m_expire.material_id = sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id and sc_acc_m_expire_detail.present_value = 0 /* and sc_acc_m_expire.cutout_date between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate*/ /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
